message:
test(packs): add coverage for 14 more pack modules + linter fixups

Add blocks_each, severity, safe_patterns, and unrelated tests for:
cloud (azure, gcp), cdn (cloudflare_workers), cicd (github_actions),
search (meilisearch, algolia, opensearch), platform (github),
remote (rsync), payment (stripe), email (ses), monitoring (prometheus),
system (disk, services).

Also includes linter reformatting of previously committed pack test
files (import deduplication, whitespace normalization).

834 pack tests pass, 0 failures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
